engine.ladder_reasoning: A 60+ item portfolio of commercials/branded/celebrity/fashion films is the site's spine and the proof; visitors decide by browsing the work itself, not by reading credentials or a service pitch.

goal.one_action: get the visitor to submit a production inquiry via the contact form

structure.archetype_note: Classic studio portfolio site: home overview + dedicated portfolio grid + about + contact form + blog; sister AI studio cross-promoted externally.

mapped.observed_as: Our Clients / named client roster (Netflix, TikTok, Grammys, Old Spice, McDonald's, Warner Bros.)
Full Creative Team 24/7 / Totally Production Ready Team / We Go The Extra Mile
Commercials / Brand Videos / New Media / UGC Videos
Tiger House Studios (Creative AI Studio) cross-promo
About Us / BORN IN LA (history since 2011, founder Jason Kent Carpenter)

unmapped.observed: Portfolio grid of ~60+ category-tagged entries linking to individual portfolio_page items
unmapped.why_no_fit: sectionList has no portfolio/work-grid id; it is the core work showcase, best captured by the gallery/portfolio capability rather than a canonical section

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; all pages, nav, CTAs, forms and proof clearly captured — unambiguous work/portfolio studio site.

gap_findings: No canonical section id for a portfolio/work grid — the defining element of work-engine sites is expressed only via the gallery/portfolio capability, not the section taxonomy.
Named-client social proof appears as narrative prose with no logos/logo-wall, so it doesn't fit socialProof's typical logo-grid expectation.
